title: Founding Charter Digitized
content: The original Horizon Institute founding charter has been moved into the public archive. Portions of the document remain unavailable while internal review continues.

title: West Campus Survey Notes
content:
West Campus Survey
west_campus_survey_2010.jpg

Survey teams documented older service corridors beneath the west campus extension. Access is limited to maintenance and research staff.

title: Continuity Research Memo
content: This memo summarizes early research into memory continuity, identity support, and post-trauma stabilization. Some names have been removed from the public copy.

title: Archive Transfer Log
content: Several boxes of paper records were moved from the lower archive into digital storage. Cross-checking is still in progress.

title: Candidate Orientation Notice
content: Prospective candidates were asked to attend a private orientation before formal admission. Attendance lists are not part of the public archive.
